series_title_en: CBT Core for Children — Stage 5: Calm Tools & Personal Plan

items.therapeutic_goal: Help children identify and choose calming tools they can use when upset or worried.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child is building awareness of simple calming strategies.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child is identifying calming tools and choosing a favorite one.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Help children notice what they feel when overwhelmed and choose a short calm plan.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child needs a simple structured plan for overwhelming feelings.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child needs to identify overwhelmed feelings and choose a few tools to help.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Help children rate feeling intensity and pick a small support for the moment.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child needs to show how strong a feeling is and what can help a little right now.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child is rating feeling intensity and choosing a small helpful action.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.title_en: Calm Plan: Before I Get Too Upset
items.therapeutic_goal: Help children notice early signs of upset and choose a first step in a calm plan.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child is preparing ahead for moments of dysregulation.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child is making a simple plan before feelings get too big.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Help children design a safe calm space with preferred comforting items.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child is creating a personalized calm corner or calm kit.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child is choosing items for a calm corner and deciding when to use it.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.

items.therapeutic_goal: Help children make a simple personal plan for when they feel overwhelmed.
items.when_to_use: Use when a child is summarizing what they notice, what tool to use first, and what to remind themselves.
items.ai_matching_summary: Use this when the child is making a short personal calm plan for hard moments.
items.safety_notes: Child-safe CBT worksheet. No graphic, frightening, self-harm, or trauma content.
